summary: Quarts Ouverts feature and notification fix testing completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: UI components verified - TabsBar with data-testid attributes, Remplacements page loads correctly. The 'Quarts disponibles' tab correctly shows only when quartsOuvertsCount > 0.

minor.issue: Some old notifications in DB missing 'titre' and 'message' fields caused 500 error - FIXED by adding default values

context_for_next_testing_agent: Quarts Ouverts feature fully implemented and tested. The 'Quarts disponibles' tab in TabsBar only appears when there are open shifts (quartsOuvertsCount > 0). Backend endpoints GET /quarts-ouverts and PUT /prendre work correctly. Notification fix verified - all notifications use 'destinataire_id' and 'statut: non_lu' fields.

GET_quarts_ouverts.details: Returns list of open shifts with enriched data (demandeur_nom, type_garde_nom, horaire)

PUT_prendre.details: Endpoint exists and validates correctly (404 for non-existent, 400 for invalid status)

remplacements_list.details: Returns list of demandes including those with statut='ouvert'

notifications_endpoint.details: Returns notifications with destinataire_id field (fixed missing titre/message handling)

tabs_bar.details: TabsBar component renders with data-testid attributes (tab-remplacements, tab-conges)

quarts_disponibles_tab.details: Tab 'Quarts disponibles' correctly hidden when quartsOuvertsCount=0 (expected behavior)

remplacements_page.details: Page loads correctly with KPIs, filters, and demandes list

destinataire_id_usage.details: All notification inserts use 'destinataire_id' (not 'user_id') and 'statut: non_lu'

code_fix_applied.issue: GET /notifications returned 500 when old notifications missing 'titre' and 'message' fields
code_fix_applied.fix: Added default values for missing fields before Pydantic validation
